description.from: Given a data directory and schema, when I run virtuus serve, it should load data once and serve queries over HTTP. POST JSON dict-in/dict-out protocol. Spec: features/cli/server_mode.feature
description.to: Given a data directory and schema, when I run virtuus serve, it should load data once and serve queries over HTTP. POST /query for dict-in/dict-out queries. Additional endpoints: GET /health (server status), POST /describe (schema metadata), POST /validate (referential integrity check), POST /warm (proactive refresh). Spec: features/cli/server_mode.feature
